description: A telecommunications equipment installer has completed physical rack-and-stack of network switches, access points, and IP phones across three floors of a new office building. Before the network can be monitored, OpManager must be configured with discovery profiles for each floor's subnet so that all installed devices are automatically detected. Read the site survey document at ~/Desktop/site_survey_discovery_plan.txt, then create three network discovery rules in ManageEngine OpManager — one for each floor subnet — with the exact names, IP ranges, and SNMP community strings specified in the document. All three discovery profiles must be persisted in OpManager's configuration. Note: If OpManager requires you to create SNMP credential profiles before associating them with discovery rules, create credential profiles with names matching the community strings (e.g., floor1-monitor) using SNMP version v2c. Application is at http://localhost:8060 (admin/Admin@123).
